'''Lopez Drinks''' was one of the biggest producers of softdrinks in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Lopez Drinks used the musician, [[Gaeriel Capens]] in a marketing campaign.<ref name="Hnn">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|sports/1337_1.html|Tryshyn / Ardees Deal Worth 3.1 Billion}}</ref>
